# MuleSoft Microsoft Service Bus Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.2) of Microsoft Service Bus Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Service Bus Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-service-bus-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Service Bus Connector documentation in one file.
